---
title: "Metagenomics Results Report"
author: "Generated using [ont_metagenomics](https://github.com/dhineshp565/ont_metagenomics) pipeline"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
  output_file: "Metagenomics_report_`r Sys.Date()`.html"
params:
  csv: ""
  krona: ""
  meta_summary: ""
  blast_hits: ""
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library(knitr)
library(base64enc)
library(htmltools)
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)
```


<br>
```{css, echo=FALSE}
.table caption {
    color: darkblue;
    font-weight: bold;
}
```

### Click dropdown to select sample {.tabset .tabset-dropdown}
```{r, results='asis',echo=FALSE}

samplelist <- read.csv(params$csv,header=FALSE,sep = ',')[-1,]
sampleid <- samplelist[,c(1)]

for (i in sampleid){
  cat("####", i, "\n")
  
  # display bracken results
  
  summary_id <- (paste(i,"_kracken_blast_summary.tsv",sep=""))
  summary_raw <- read.csv(summary_id,header = TRUE,sep = "\t")
  summary_final <- summary_raw[,c(2,3,4,5)]
  colnames(summary_final) <- c("kraken2-Genus_level","Read_Count","Abundance (%)","BLAST_hits_Species")
  
  print(
    knitr::kable(
      summary_final,
      align = "lccl",
      caption = "kraken2 and BLAST results summary ([kraken2](https://ccb.jhu.edu/software/kraken2/) and [BLAST+](https://doi.org/10.1186/1471-2105-10-421))"
    ) %>%
      kable_styling()
  )

  cat('\n\n<!-- -->\n\n')

 
  
  # Construct filename for the best BLAST hits report
  blast_ids <- (paste(i,"_blast_best_hits.tsv",sep=""))
  
  # Read the tab-separated BLAST report
  blast_raw <- read.csv(blast_ids,header = TRUE,sep = "\t")
  
  # Select relevant columns: Query ID, Length, Coverage, Identity, E-value, Subject TaxIDs, Title
  blast_final <- blast_raw[,c(1,3,4,5,6,11)]
  colnames(blast_final) <- c("QUERY_ID","LENGTH","%COVERAGE","%IDENTITY","E_VAL","STITLE")
  print(
    knitr::kable(
      blast_final,
      align = "lccccl",
      caption = "Best BLAST hits. Generated using [BLAST+](https://doi.org/10.1186/1471-2105-10-421)"
    ) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = F)
  )

  cat('\n\n<!-- -->\n\n')
}
  
  
cat('\n\n<!-- -->\n\n')
```
<br>

<br>

## Taxonomic classification of raw reads using [Kraken2](https://ccb.jhu.edu/software/kraken2/) and visualization using [Krona](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/1471-2105-12-385)


```{r, echo=FALSE}
library("htmltools")
if (!is.null(params$krona) && nzchar(params$krona) && file.exists(params$krona)) {
  htmltools::tags$iframe(
    src = base64enc::dataURI(file = params$krona, mime = "text/html; charset=UTF-8"),
    style = "border:10; position:relative; top:0; left:; right::; bottom:; width:100%; height:800px"
  )
} else {
  htmltools::tags$p("Krona report is not available for this run.")
}
```
<br>
